title: Creative Direction & Styled Setups
intro: Some shoots need more than a location. They need a concept, a feeling and a visual story.
body: Shaney offers creative direction and styled setup support for clients who want their shoot to feel intentional and beautifully put together. From building her own sets to styling themed sessions, cake smash setups, seasonal concepts and brand content shoots, she helps create the scene before capturing the story. This is especially valuable for brands, families, creators and businesses that need photography and social media content with a clear visual identity.
